label: Automatizuj boiler
info:
Optimalizované flow pro řízení bojleru s hysterezí.

KONFIGURACE: Klikni na node '⚙️ Konfigurace' a spusť ho pro nastavení výchozích hodnot.
Pro změnu parametrů uprav hodnoty v tom nodu a znovu ho spusť.

Priorita rozhodování:
1. Nejsme doma → MIN°C
2. Rychle teplá voda → MAX°C
3. 17:00-19:30 a voda < 58°C → VYSOKA°C
4. Solární přebytek → MAX/VYSOKA°C
5. Levná elektřina (ne v letním režimu) → STREDNI°C
6. Jinak → MIN°C

label: Automatizuj filtraci v bazénu
info:
Řízení filtrace bazénu podle sezóny, přebytku a SOC.
Refaktorováno: 1 rozhodovací funkce místo 30+ nodes.

label: FVE Config
info: Konfigurace FVE automatizace - parametry a inicializace

label: FVE Heating
info:
Kompletní řízení topení domu v2.0
NIBE + oběhové čerpadlo + patrony + ventil + chlazení

label: FVE History Learning

label: FVE Modes
info: Implementace jednotlivých módů FVE automatizace (refaktor v3 - link-out/link-in, 0 crossing wires)

label: FVE Orchestrator
info: Hlavní orchestrace FVE - plánování a rozhodování o módech

sql:
SELECT  p.day, p.hour, p.minute, p.priceCZK, ph.priceCZKhour, f.*
FROM own_energy_prices p INNER JOIN own_energy_fees f ON 1 = 1 INNER JOIN (SELECT day, hour, avg(priceCZK) priceCZKhour 
FROM own_energy_prices GROUP BY day, hour) ph ON p.day = ph.day and p.hour = ph.hour
name: Vyber spotové ceny
Sestav insert
func:
let day = msg.payload.day
let hour = msg.payload.hour
let minute = msg.payload.minute
let marginBuy = msg.payload.marginBuy
let marginProd = msg.payload.marginProd
let distrVT = msg.payload.distrVT
let distrNT = msg.payload.distrNT
let tax = msg.payload.tax
let sys_services = msg.payload.sys_services
let poze = msg.payload.poze
let priceCZKquarter = msg.payload.priceCZK
let priceCZKhour = msg.payload.priceCZKhour
let priceCZKhourBuy = 0
let priceCZKhourProd = 0
let priceCZKquarterBuy = 0
let priceCZKquarterProd = 0
let distr = 0
let insert = ""

flow.set("myCount", 1)

if ([6,9,13,16].includes(hour)) {
    distr = distrVT
} else {
    distr = distrNT
}

priceCZKhourBuy = (((priceCZKhour / 1000) + marginBuy + distr + tax + sys_services + poze) * 1.21).toFixed(2)
priceCZKquarterBuy = (((priceCZKquarter / 1000) + marginBuy + distr + tax + sys_services + poze) * 1.21).toFixed(2)
priceCZKhourProd = Math.floor(((priceCZKhour / 1000) - marginProd) * 100 + Number.EPSILON) / 100
priceCZKquarterProd = Math.floor(((priceCZKquarter / 1000) - marginProd) * 100 + Number.EPSILON) /100



insert = 
`INSERT INTO "own_energy_prices_total" ("day", "hour", "minute", "priceCZKhourBuy", \
 "priceCZKhourProd", "priceCZKquarterBuy", "priceCZKquarterProd") VALUES  \
 ("${day}", ${hour}, ${minute}, ${priceCZKhourBuy}, ${priceCZKhourProd}, ${priceCZKquarterBuy}, ${priceCZKquarterProd})`

msg.payload = insert
msg.topic = insert

return msg;

sql:
CREATE TABLE "own_energy_prices"   (
  "day" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "hour" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "minute" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "priceEur" REAL NOT NULL,
  "priceCZK" REAL NOT NULL,
  "level" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "levelNum" INTEGER NOT NULL
);
name: Proveď insert
Čti ceny z global
Sestav insert
func:
let day = msg.day
let hour = msg.payload.hour
let minute = msg.payload.minute
let priceEur = msg.payload.priceEur
let priceCZK = msg.payload.priceCZK
let level = msg.payload.level
let levelNum = msg.payload.levelNum
let insert = ""
let myRecordCount = flow.get("myRecordCount")

insert = 
`INSERT INTO "own_energy_prices" ("day", "hour", "minute", "priceEur", \
 "priceCZK", "level", "levelNum") VALUES ("${day}", ${hour}, ${minute}, \
 ${priceEur}, ${priceCZK}, "${level}", ${levelNum})`

flow.set("myRecordCount", ++myRecordCount)

msg.payload = insert
msg.topic = insert

return msg;

sql:
CREATE TABLE "own_energy_prices"   (
  "day" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "hour" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "minute" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "priceEur" REAL NOT NULL,
  "priceCZK" REAL NOT NULL,
  "level" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "levelNum" INTEGER NOT NULL
);

sql:
SELECT day, hour, minute, priceCZKhourBuy, priceCZKquarterBuy, priceCZKhourProd, priceCZKquarterProd,
       dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY priceCZKhourBuy) levelCheapestHourBuy,
       dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY priceCZKquarterBuy) levelCheapestQuarterBuy,
       dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY priceCZKhourProd desc) levelMostExpensiveHourProd,
       dense_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY day ORDER BY priceCZKquarterProd desc) levelMostExpensiveQuarterProd
FROM "own_energy_prices_total"
name: Spočítej levely cen
Sestav update
func:
let day = msg.payload.day
let hour = msg.payload.hour
let minute = msg.payload.minute
let levelCheapestHourBuy = msg.payload.levelCheapestHourBuy
let levelCheapestQuarterBuy = msg.payload.levelCheapestQuarterBuy
let levelMostExpensiveHourProd = msg.payload.levelMostExpensiveHourProd
let levelMostExpensiveQuarterProd = msg.payload.levelMostExpensiveQuarterProd
let update = ""

flow.set("myCount", 1)

update = 
`UPDATE "own_energy_prices_total" 
 SET levelCheapestHourBuy = ${levelCheapestHourBuy},
     levelCheapestQuarterBuy = ${levelCheapestQuarterBuy},
     levelMostExpensiveHourProd = ${levelMostExpensiveHourProd},
     levelMostExpensiveQuarterProd = ${levelMostExpensiveQuarterProd}
 WHERE day = "${day}" AND hour = ${hour} AND minute = ${minute}`       

msg.payload = update
msg.topic = update

return msg;

sql:
CREATE TABLE "own_energy_prices"   (
  "day" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "hour" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "minute" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "priceEur" REAL NOT NULL,
  "priceCZK" REAL NOT NULL,
  "level" VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  "levelNum" INTEGER NOT NULL
);
